testcase.name: AppConfig > should have providers defined
AppRoutes > should be defined as an array
AppComponent > should create the app
AppComponent > should toggle sidebar
AppComponent > should handle successful shortening
AppComponent > should handle shortening error 409
AppComponent > should handle shortening generic error
AppComponent > should not execute shortening if form is invalid
AppComponent > should open analytics drawer
AppComponent > should close analytics drawer
AppComponent > should focus destination input
AppComponent > should copy to clipboard and show notification
AppComponent > should navigate between pages
AppComponent > should handle hovering over short links
AppComponent > should poll global clicks and health
AppComponent > should cleanup observer on destroy
AppComponent > should handle navigation edge cases
AppComponent > should handle analytics fetch error
AppComponent > should expose global WhoaApp hooks
AppComponent > should initialize viewport observer and handle changes
AnimatedCounterComponent > should animate from 0 to target value
AnimatedCounterComponent > should handle decreasing values
AnimatedCounterComponent > should return early if target is same as current
AnimatedCounterComponent > should cleanup interval on destroy
ApiService > should be created
ApiService > should create a short URL
ApiService > should handle errors in createShortUrl
ApiService > should handle errors in getAnalytics
ApiService > should handle errors in getBulkAnalytics
ApiService > should handle errors in getPagedUrls
ApiService > should handle errors in getGlobalClicks
ApiService > should check health correctly
ApiService > should check health raw correctly
ApiService > should handle paged URLs with cursor
ApiService > should get analytics success
ApiService > should get bulk analytics success
ApiService > should get global clicks success
DbService > should be created
DbService > should seed data manually for testing
testcase.system-out: Local development mode: Seeding IndexedDB with sample data...

testcase.name: DbService > should add a URL
DbService > should bulk add URLs
DbService > should update analytics
DbService > should get all URLs
DbService > should provide liveUrls (alias for getUrls)
SyncService > should be created
SyncService > should not sync if already syncing
SyncService > should not sync if viewport is empty
SyncService > should not sync if no visible links are registered
SyncService > should perform sync successfully
SyncService > should handle API error during sync
SyncService > should handle error in getUrls
SyncService > should start and stop scheduled sync
SyncService > should skip sync if skipSync is true
